summary: Replace concept-match word-length threshold (len(word) > 4) — magic number drops short core terms (gnosis, logos, aeons, dao)

resolution.note: Added [retrieval].concept_match_min_word_len (default 3, previously hardcoded > 4 so effective floor was 5). Now captures dao/maya/ayin/logos/aeons/gnosis via the per-token substring path; full-ID phrase match unaffected.
